files.patch:
@@ -69,2 +69,2 @@
-MAKEFLAGS_SINGLE := $(firstword -$(filter-out --%, $(MAKEFLAGS)))
-ifeq ($(findstring p, $(MAKEFLAGS_SINGLE))$(findstring q, $(MAKEFLAGS_SINGLE)), pq)
+MFLAGS_SINGLE := $(filter-out --%, $(MFLAGS))
+ifeq ($(findstring p, $(MFLAGS_SINGLE))$(findstring q, $(MFLAGS_SINGLE)), pq)
